sub_pixel_system.notes: Not applicable - rhythm/exercise game with no documented movement physics

special_mechanics.name: Power Pad Input System
special_mechanics.description: Game uses NES Power Pad (3x4 dance mat) for input. Players step on pads to follow instructor choreography. Center two buttons can be de-activated to allow standing. Hand input also supported in advanced levels.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Dance Aerobics is a rhythm/exercise game rather than a platformer with jumping mechanics. No traditional player movement physics documented. Game focuses on input timing against pre-choreographed sequences rather than physics-based character movement. Wikipedia source provides gameplay modes and control information but no quantitative movement or physics parameters.
